{{Infobox character
| name = Sandviper Gokren
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
| name = Sandviper Gokren
| aliases = Gokren
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Truegold, chief of the Sandvipers, Sandviper chief
| abilities = Path of the Sandviper
| affiliations = Sandvipers, Sandviper sect, Jai clan
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

''See also: [[Sandviper Gokren Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Gokren is the [[Truegold]] chief of the [[Sandviper sect]] and the father of Kral, a [[Highgold]]. A wiry man with slicked-back gray hair, he typically wears furs and carries two short, one-handed spears on his back. As a practitioner of the Sandviper [[Path]], he utilizes toxic, corrosive green madra and possesses an acid-green serpent on his arm. Gokren is a powerful leader who has been known to lead hunts and command his people with authority. He maintains a close bond with [[Jai Long]], even pledging to support him against the [[Jai clan]] and treating his son's enemies as his own. Despite his strength, he has faced significant injury in combat, including losing a hand to [[Lindon]] and suffering a fatal encounter with the creature [[Orthos]].}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Gokren is absent from the [[Sandvipers]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Gokren is the [[Truegold]] and chief of the [[Sandvipers]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18">''Soulsmith'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Gokren is a member of the [[Sandviper sect]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19">''Soulsmith'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Gokren has a [[Highgold]] son.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19" />}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Sandviper Gokren is the gray-haired chief of the [[Sandvipers]], a sect that provides vehicles and mounts. He utilizes a short spear and wields foul, bitter [[Forged madra]] from the [[Path of the Sandviper]], which causes his weapon to glow green with toxic energy. An associate of [[Jai Long]], Gokren rides a bat donated by the [[Jai clan]] and keeps an acid-green Sandviper on his arm. Following the death of his son, who was an [[Iron]], Gokren engaged in combat where he ultimately lost a hand to [[Lindon]]'s [[Path]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Gokren's son was an [[Iron]] who was killed.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2">''Blackflame'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Gokren has an acid-green Sandviper on his arm.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Gokren uses [[Forged madra]] from the [[Path of the Sandviper]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Gokren is the [[Sandviper chief]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4">''Blackflame'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Gokren has gray hair.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Gokren uses a short spear.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Gokren's [[madra]] is foul and bitter.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Gokren is a leader or member of a sect that provides mounts and vehicles.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6">''Blackflame'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Gokren is a member of the [[Sandvipers]] who rides a bat donated by the [[Jai clan]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8">''Blackflame'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Gokren is an associate of [[Jai Long]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Sandviper Gokren]] is a Sandviper.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16">''Blackflame'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Gokren is a Sandviper who wields a spear.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Gokren's spear glows green with toxic [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Gokren lost a hand to [[Lindon]]'s [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] took off [[Sandviper Gokren]]'s hand while [[Lindon]] was a [[Lowgold]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Jai clan]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
